# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates curl gnupg \
    nginx \
    redis-server \
    postgresql postgresql-contrib \
    supervisor \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Configure PostgreSQL to listen on all interfaces for dev convenience
RUN sed -i "s/^#listen_addresses =.*/listen_addresses = '*'/" /etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf \
    && printf "\n# Dev-only: allow all connections\nhost all all 0.0.0.0/0 md5\nhost all all ::/0 md5\n" >> /etc/postgresql/*/main/pg_hba.conf

# Configure Redis to listen on all interfaces for dev convenience
RUN sed -i "s/^bind .*/bind 0.0.0.0 ::1/" /etc/redis/redis.conf \
    && sed -i "s/^protected-mode .*/protected-mode no/" /etc/redis/redis.conf

# Minimal Nginx config to serve static content
RUN rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default \
    && printf "server {\n  listen 80 default_server;\n  listen [::]:80 default_server;\n  root /var/www/html;\n  index index.html;\n  location / {\n    try_files \$uri \$uri/ =404;\n  }\n}\n" > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default \
    && ln -sf /etc/nginx/sites-available/default /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default \
    && mkdir -p /var/www/html \
    && printf "<!doctype html><html><head><title>Dev Container</title></head><body><h1>All-in-one dev container</h1></body></html>\n" > /var/www/html/index.html

# Simple placeholder API server on port 8080 (replace with your app)
RUN printf "#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -e\npython3 -m http.server 8080 --bind 0.0.0.0\n" > /usr/local/bin/api-server \
    && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/api-server \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Supervisor config to run all services
RUN printf "[supervisord]\nnodaemon=true\nlogfile=/dev/null\npidfile=/tmp/supervisord.pid\n\n[program:nginx]\ncommand=/usr/sbin/nginx -g 'daemon off;'\nautostart=true\nautorestart=true\nstdout_logfile=/dev/fd/1\nstdout_logfile_maxbytes=0\nstderr_logfile=/dev/fd/2\nstderr_logfile_maxbytes=0\n\n[program:redis]\ncommand=/usr/bin/redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf\nautostart=true\nautorestart=true\nstdout_logfile=/dev/fd/1\nstdout_logfile_maxbytes=0\nstderr_logfile=/dev/fd/2\nstderr_logfile_maxbytes=0\n\n[program:postgres]\ncommand=/usr/lib/postgresql/*/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/*/main -c config_file=/etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf\nuser=postgres\nautostart=true\nautorestart=true\nstdout_logfile=/dev/fd/1\nstdout_logfile_maxbytes=0\nstderr_logfile=/dev/fd/2\nstderr_logfile_maxbytes=0\n\n[program:api]\ncommand=/usr/local/bin/api-server\nautostart=true\nautorestart=true\nstdout_logfile=/dev/fd/1\nstdout_logfile_maxbytes=0\nstderr_logfile=/dev/fd/2\nstderr_logfile_maxbytes=0\n" > /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
